function.message: I identified and read the next inbox item (`99_system/workflows/deletion-and-wiping.md`), but it is a general workflow note rather than a concrete request. It does not specify any file targets or actionable operation to execute now, so I cannot safely perform a task-specific mutation from this item alone. Please clarify what action you want taken for this inbox item (e.g., specific files to delete/move/update).
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system, read relevant workflow docs, selected lowest visible inbox item, and avoided mutation because the item lacked uniquely supported actionable targets.
function.outcome_justification: `99_system/workflows/deletion-and-wiping.md` says to delete only exact supported targets and to stop for clarification if evidence does not uniquely support deleting a file. The file itself provides no concrete target set, so completing the requested handling would require guessing.
